name.en: Extra! Extra! Hot Off the Press

summoning_condition.en: This card's name becomes "Hot Off the Press" while in the Graveyard.

requirement.en: You have a face-up EARTH Attribute Machine Type monster on your field.

effect.en: Your opponent excavates the bottom 3 cards of their Deck and shows them. Inflict damage to your opponent equal to [the number of monsters among the shown cards] x 400. Place 2 of the 3 excavated cards on the top of your opponent's Deck in any order, and place the remaining card on the bottom of your opponent's Deck.
